Container.Name: RustPad
Container.Overview:
RustPad is a self-hosted, lightweight collaborative notepad application built in Rust with Yew and Axum.
Key Features: - Real-time synchronization of notes across users. - Syntactical highlight option for various coding languages. - Optional security access locking using a PIN.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for notepad database files.

Config.Name: Access PIN
Config.Description: Optional access PIN to secure notepad access. Leave empty for public mode.

Config.Name: Site Title
Config.Description: Custom website title rendered in the navigation header.

Config.Name: Highlight Languages
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of programming language codes for syntax highlight choices (e.g. rust,javascript,python). Leave empty for all standard languages.
